content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: x-user-id ∧ header ∧ spoofing | client ∧ identity ∧ override | auth ∧ bypass
H: untrusted_client → x-user-id: ∧ "victim_id" → service ∧ trusts → horizontal_escalation
P: gateway ∧ strip ∧ client ∧ x-user-id | session.userId ∧ authoritative | verify ∧ trusted_proxy ∧ assertion
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Goal: x-user-id and header and spoofing or client and identity and override or auth and bypass.
Hypothesis: untrusted_client then x-user-id: and "victim_id" then service and trusts then horizontal_escalation.
Plan: gateway and strip and client and x-user-id or session.userId and authoritative or verify and trusted_proxy and assertion.
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.
